raw_consumer_statement:
I booked a hotel stay at XXXX XXXX XXXX from XX/XX/2025XX/XX/year> to XX/XX/2025with American Express XXXX card. The hotel is under the " Fine Hotels and Resort '' ( FHR ) program by Amex, which provides free room upgrade during check-in. During the check-in process, the front desk asked if I would like to have a room upgrade, as part of the FHR benefits. She presented me an XXXX to select the room upgrade I'd like, so I chose one. During the check-out, the manager claimed that the specific room type I selected was not part of the FHR program, and charged me the room upgrade fee. 

I asked American Express to dispute the claim, but Amex would not resolve my dispute in my favor.
